title: PeerWell - Surgical Preparation Platform
problem: Surgical outcomes depend on patient preparation and optimization before surgery, but practices lack tools to ensure patients are ready.
solution: Digital pre-habilitation platform that prepares patients for surgery with personalized exercise, nutrition guidance, and education programs.
technology: Mobile app, AI personalization, wearable integration, behavior change science
regulatory_notes: No FDA clearance needed, clinical validation completed
varden_fit: HIGH - Pre-surgical optimization is key care coordination opportunity. Could expand beyond orthopedics.
notes: Novel approach to surgical preparation. Strong outcomes data.
